case_title: YING LAI JOE CHOW VS. SASA SIMIC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY CHOW, YING LAI JOE AS TO DEFENDANT SIMIC, SASA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOW, YING LAI JOE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SIMIC, SASA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED JUL-17-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SIMIC, SASA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-20-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.
